Then output exactly: Critical escalations resumed for today.

details.description: Local-only critical sentinel. Immediate alert exception path only.

payload.message: Run local sentinel only: python C:\\Users\\JeremiahVanWagner\\.openclaw\\openclaw-prod\\scripts\\ops_control.py --db-path C:\\Users\\JeremiahVanWagner\\.config\\openclaw-prod\\ops.db sentinel --timezone America/Chicago. If output is CRITICAL_ALERT_SENT return [ACTION REQUIRED] Critical incident notification dispatched. content.text:
{
  "id": "agent-heartbeat-monitor-15m",
  "agentId": "shared_master_orchestrator",
  "name": "agent-heartbeat-monitor",
  "description": "Monitor critical agent heartbeats every 15 minutes",
  "enabled": true,
  "createdAtMs": 1773341200000,
  "updatedAtMs": 1773406990226,
  "schedule": {
    "kind": "cron",
    "expr": "*/15 * * * *",
    "tz": "America/New_York"
  },
  "sessionTarget": "isolated",
  "wakeMode": "now",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "agentTurn",
    "message": "HEARTBEAT MONITOR: Check critical agent status (d1_ceo, d1_cto, shared_master_orchestrator). For any agent with last_heartbeat > 30 minutes, trigger immediate escalation. Silent if all healthy.",
    "thinking": "low",
    "lightContext": true
  },
  "delivery": {
    "mode": "none",
    "channel": "last"
  },
  "state": {
    "consecutiveErrors": 0,
    "lastRunAtMs": 1773362716538,
    "lastRunStatus": "ok",
    "lastStatus": "ok",
    "lastDurationMs": 152604,
    "lastDelivered": false,
    "lastDeliveryStatus": "not-delivered",
    "nextRunAtMs": 1773407700000
  },
  "failureAlert": {
    "after": 2,
    "channel": "telegram",
    "to": "7737707872",
    "cooldownMs": 3600000,
    "mode": "announce"
  }
}

content.text:
{
  "id": "agent-network-health-hourly",
  "agentId": "shared_master_orchestrator",
  "name": "agent-network-health-check",
  "description": "Hourly health check across all active agents in the 75-agent network",
  "enabled": true,
  "createdAtMs": 1773341200000,
  "updatedAtMs": 1773406990245,
  "schedule": {
    "kind": "cron",
    "expr": "0 * * * *",
    "tz": "America/New_York",
    "staggerMs": 300000
  },
  "sessionTarget": "isolated",
  "wakeMode": "now",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "agentTurn",
    "message": "AGENT NETWORK HEALTH CHECK: Query Supabase agent_metrics table for all agents. Report: 1) Agents with heartbeat > 30 min stale. 2) Error rates above 5%. 3) Response times above threshold. 4) Memory utilization. Escalate critical issues to d1_cto. Format as Telegram-friendly summary."
  },
  "delivery": {
    "mode": "none",
    "channel": "last"
  },
  "state": {
    "consecutiveErrors": 2,
    "lastRunAtMs": 1773360310695,
    "lastRunStatus": "error",
    "lastStatus": "error",
    "lastDurationMs": 597331,
    "lastDelivered": false,
    "lastDeliveryStatus": "not-delivered",
    "lastDeliveryError": "⚠️ ✉️ Message failed",
    "lastError": "⚠️ ✉️ Message failed",
    "nextRunAtMs": 1773407052495
  },
  "failureAlert": {
    "after": 3,
    "channel": "telegram",
    "to": "7737707872",
    "cooldownMs": 21600000,
    "mode": "announce"
  }
}

details.name: agent-network-health-check
details.description: Hourly health check across all active agents in the 75-agent network

payload.message: AGENT NETWORK HEALTH CHECK: Query Supabase agent_metrics table for all agents. Report: 1) Agents with heartbeat > 30 min stale. 2) Error rates above 5%. 3) Response times above threshold. 4) Memory utilization. Escalate critical issues to d1_cto. Format as Telegram-friendly summary.
